market_context:
Cohort size: 357 listings scraped in the same market.
Median nightly rate: £175.00
Median 90-day occupancy: 28.3%

title_variants: Luxury Garden View Home – Steps to City Centre
Cozy City‑Close Retreat – Garden & Modern Style
analysis.rewritten_desc:
Welcome to your private modern house with a stunning garden view, just a short walk from the city centre. This entire‑home retreat comfortably sleeps up to four guests, making it ideal for couples, small families, or business travelers seeking a blend of comfort and convenience. The stylish interior features an open‑plan living area that flows onto a landscaped garden, perfect for morning coffee or evening relaxation under the sky. A fully equipped kitchen provides everything you need to prepare meals, while two well‑appointed bedrooms ensure a restful night’s sleep. 

Rated 4.67 by 189 satisfied guests, the home consistently earns high marks for cleanliness and location. Although the nightly rate is £312 – 78% above the city’s median of £175 – the property’s prime garden setting and modern design offer a premium experience. Currently, only 17.4% of the next 90 nights are booked, leaving 74 open nights that could be filled with the right pricing and amenity tweaks. 

Located minutes from shops, restaurants, and public transport, you’ll enjoy quick access to the city’s attractions while returning to a peaceful garden oasis each evening. Book now to experience modern comfort, a beautiful outdoor space, and a central location that together create a memorable stay.
top_amenity_gaps: Outdoor seating/dining area in the garden
In‑room entertainment – smart TV or streaming services
analysis.photo_order_rec: Use a bright, high‑resolution shot of the garden view from the living area as the cover photo; it instantly showcases the property’s biggest visual asset and sets a relaxing tone.
key_diagnosis: Your nightly rate of £312 is 78% higher than the city median (£175) while occupancy is only 17.4% (74 of the next 90 nights are still open) – lower the price or add promotions to boost bookings.
No high‑value amenities are listed; adding parking, dedicated outdoor seating, and a streaming TV could attract more guests and justify the premium rate.
The listing lacks a compelling description and SEO‑friendly title; rewriting both with keyword‑rich copy and highlighting the garden view will improve search visibility and conversion.
analysis.outreach_hook: Your listing is priced at £312 per night—78% above the city median—yet it’s only booked 17.4% of the next 90 days, leaving 74 nights open.
